'''âb-v-v''' ('''kabavav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenoperfuse|xenoperfuse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenoperfuse|xenoperfuse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| kabavav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibavav|thibavav]] || [[word:jibavav|jibavav]] || [[word:shibavav|shibavav]] || [[word:kibavav|kibavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubavav|thuthubavav]] || [[word:jujubavav|jujubavav]] || [[word:shushubavav|shushubavav]] || [[word:kukubavav|kukubavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubavav|thubavav]] || [[word:jubavav|jubavav]] || [[word:shubavav|shubavav]] || [[word:kubavav|kubavav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubavav|thubavav]] || [[word:jubavav|jubavav]] || [[word:shubavav|shubavav]] || [[word:kubavav|kubavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebavav|thebavav]] || [[word:jebavav|jebavav]] || [[word:shebavav|shebavav]] || [[word:kebavav|kebavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobavav|thothobavav]] || [[word:jojobavav|jojobavav]] || [[word:shoshobavav|shoshobavav]] || [[word:kokobavav|kokobavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobavav|thobavav]] || [[word:jobavav|jobavav]] || [[word:shobavav|shobavav]] || [[word:kobavav|kobavav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobavav|thobavav]] || [[word:jobavav|jobavav]] || [[word:shobavav|shobavav]] || [[word:kobavav|kobavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbavav|thĂŠbavav]] || [[word:jĂŠbavav|jĂŠbavav]] || [[word:shĂŠbavav|shĂŠbavav]] || [[word:kĂŠbavav|kĂŠbavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabavav|thathabavav]] || [[word:jajabavav|jajabavav]] || [[word:shashabavav|shashabavav]] || [[word:kakabavav|kakabavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabavav|thabavav]] || [[word:jabavav|jabavav]] || [[word:shabavav|shabavav]] || [[word:kabavav|kabavav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabavav|thabavav]] || [[word:jabavav|jabavav]] || [[word:shabavav|shabavav]] || [[word:kabavav|kabavav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabavav|shabavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabavav|goshabavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabavav|gokishabavav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabavavnĂŒ|shabavavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabavavnknĂŒ|goshabavavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavavnĂŒ|gokishabavavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabavavshĂ«|shabavavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabavavnkshĂ«|goshabavavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabavavshĂ«|gokishabavavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavavro|shabavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavavnkro|goshabavavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavavro|gokishabavavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavavmu|shabavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavavnkmu|goshabavavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavavmu|gokishabavavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabavavsher|shabavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabavavnksher|goshabavavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabavavsher|gokishabavavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabavavng|shabavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabavavnkng|goshabavavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabavavng|gokishabavavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabavavya|shabavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabavavnkya|goshabavavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabavavya|gokishabavavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabavavyam|shabavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabavavnkyam|goshabavavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabavavyam|gokishabavavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavavnĂŒshĂ«|shabavavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabavavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabavavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavavnĂŒro|shabavavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavavnknĂŒro|goshabavavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavavnĂŒro|gokishabavavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavavnĂŒmu|shabavavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavavnknĂŒmu|goshabavavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavavnĂŒmu|gokishabavavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavavshĂ«nĂŒ|shabavavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabavavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabavavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavavshĂ«ro|shabavavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavavnkshĂ«ro|goshabavavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavavshĂ«ro|gokishabavavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavavshĂ«mu|shabavavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavavnkshĂ«mu|goshabavavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavavshĂ«mu|gokishabavavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavavronĂŒ|shabavavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavavnkronĂŒ|goshabavavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavavronĂŒ|gokishabavavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavavroshĂ«|shabavavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavavnkroshĂ«|goshabavavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavavroshĂ«|gokishabavavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabavavromu|shabavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabavavnkromu|goshabavavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabavavromu|gokishabavavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabavavmunĂŒ|shabavavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabavavnkmunĂŒ|goshabavavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabavavmunĂŒ|gokishabavavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabavavmushĂ«|shabavavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabavavnkmushĂ«|goshabavavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabavavmushĂ«|gokishabavavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabavavmuro|shabavavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabavavnkmuro|goshabavavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabavavmuro|gokishabavavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
